title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates:
Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Impresario Entertainment Asia Pacific Associates!
